options.command: docker compose --env-file i12e/orchestrator/.env.dev --file i12e/orchestrator/docker-compose.yml up --detach --build postgres && docker compose --env-file i12e/orchestrator/.env.dev --file i12e/orchestrator/docker-compose.yml run --rm --no-deps postgres-migrate && docker compose --env-file i12e/orchestrator/.env.dev --file i12e/orchestrator/docker-compose.yml up --detach --build weather cockpit
